author: jeffoodchain
content:
Hi everyone, I am Jeff. thank you Mario and Josh for organizing. here are my update for week 0:

I am interested in p2p network and the consensus layer mainly. I am currently working on the backfill sync (block only) in lodestar. Hopefully I will be able to write down some blob updates and catch what Gloas do for the blob and data column updates. Currently the progress is in https://github.com/ChainSafe/lodestar/pull/9238

For the EPF project, I am interested in several topic: 
* [State data analysis](https://github.com/stateless-consensus/wishlist/blob/main/ideas/state-data-analysis.md)
* Grandine: lean client

author: krisoshea.eth
content:
Really nice write up <@1335660981019480075>, I like how you’ve laid it all out, helped my understanding of the problem too! I’ll have my write up published over the weekend so hopefully there will be some stuff / resources in it that you find useful or interesting too, it’s a big topic to research so
I’m hoping we will all uncover / find all the relevant areas to research by cross referencing each others work / write ups. One thing I’ve found with this project is it touches so many EIPs, PRs that are in draft etc, and other client architectures so there’s plenty to research and plenty of things to read up on. It’s a fun one to dive into though, great way to brute force execution client learning / study

author: dicethedev
content:
Hey everyone. I'm Blessing, joining EPF7 as a permissionless fellow.

My focus this cohort is the consensus layer. I'm currently exploring implementing EIP-7732 (ePBS) in Grandine as my main project direction and I will spending this week going through the existing Lighthouse, Nimbus, and Prysm ePBS implementations from previous EPF cohorts and starting to map the change surface inside the Grandine codebase. Also Also keeping an eye on Grandine's Disk Usage Optimization and Non-Finalized Checkpoint Sync proposals while I narrow down and before fully committing to a scope. Great to be here and looking forward to learning alongside everyone.
More info about my week 0 update: https://hackmd.io/@dicethedev/HkHB60wZfl

author: lqzic
content:
Hey everyone, my name is Marko.

I've been contributing to Lodestar and Zeam over the past few months:
https://github.com/ChainSafe/lodestar/pulls?q=is%3Apr+author%3Amarkolazic01
https://github.com/blockblaz/zeam/pulls?q=is%3Apr+author%3Amarkolazic01
I also have an EIP I'd like to formalize, currently it's on the Magicians forum:
https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/eip-xxxx-batch-kzg-point-evaluation-via-bls12-381-precompile-composition/28534

For the fellowship, I'm planning to work on something impactful for Lodestar, I'm hoping to pick up one of their upcoming project proposals. In the meantime I'll keep up with PRs.

Good luck everyone, great to meet you all.
